title: Corycium bicolorum

It belongs to the family Ericorchidaceae, a family of orchids that was previously included in the family Didymoporoideae, which is part of the subfamily Apostasioideae of the orchid family Orchidaceae. Corycium bicolorum is native to the island of Madagascar. This species is known for being one of the smallest orchids in the world. Corycium bicolorum is a unique and fascinating addition to the world of orchids.
